name: feature-grid-basic
title: Feature Grid Basic
description: A text-first Payload block for shipping a responsive feature grid with optional CTA wiring.

preview.summary: Three-up feature grid with supporting copy and an optional CTA.

sampleContent.title: Add a feature grid that looks native to the repo on the first install.
sampleContent.description: This kit is designed to prove that multi-item content blocks install cleanly, register exactly once, and stay easy to reuse across client projects.

items.title: Repo-aware install
items.description: Installs through the same registry flow as hero-basic and wires the block into the supported Payload layout surface.

items.title: Text-first structure
items.description: Keeps the alpha block focused on clear editorial fields instead of extra primitives, icons, or interactive admin behavior.

items.title: Multi-kit proof
items.description: Exercises the second-kit path so repeated installs, dedupe behavior, and state tracking are proven on real code.
